name: pure_lego_contact_structure_s3
classification_note: Standalone pure-geometry lego for the standard contact structure on S³. Distinct from sim_geom_symplectic_kahler_contact.py which bundles contact as one of three structures (symplectic/Kähler/contact) in a comparative survey. This probe verifies α∧dα≠0, Reeb field axioms, and Hopf-fiber identity in isolation, using pytorch (load_bearing) + z3 UNSAT + sympy symbolic dα formula.

pytorch.reason: Primary engine for all contact geometry computations: S³ point generation, tangent projection, contact form evaluation α(v), exterior derivative dα(u,v), Reeb field R, nondegeneracy α∧dα, Hopf orbit flow

pyg.reason: not relevant to S³ contact structure probe

z3.reason: UNSAT proof: assuming contact form is integrable (α∧dα=0) contradicts explicit formula at p=(1,0,0,0) where α∧dα=2. Integrability is structurally impossible.

cvc5.reason: not relevant to S³ contact structure probe

sympy.reason: Symbolic verification that d(x₀dx₁−x₁dx₀+x₂dx₃−x₃dx₂) = 2(dx₀∧dx₁+dx₂∧dx₃) via exterior derivative matrix computation

clifford.reason: not relevant to S³ contact structure probe

geomstats.reason: not relevant to S³ contact structure probe

e3nn.reason: not relevant to S³ contact structure probe

rustworkx.reason: not relevant to S³ contact structure probe

xgi.reason: not relevant to S³ contact structure probe

details.note: Random S³ points satisfy ‖p‖² = 1 to float64 precision
α∧dα is a nonzero 3-form (volume form) on T_pS³. Expected value ≈ 2 for orthonormal frames. Nonzero means ker(α) is maximally non-integrable.
R = d/dt|₀ e^{it}(z₀,z₁) = (−x₁,x₀,−x₃,x₂). Hopf U(1) flow preserves S³ and contact structure.
Symbolic exterior derivative confirms dα = 2(dx₀∧dx₁+dx₂∧dx₃). All other wedge components vanish.
dα ≠ 0: α is NOT a closed form. Closed contact form would give trivial bundle. This confirms α is a genuine contact form, not an exact 1-form.

details.frobenius_condition: α∧dα=0 everywhere ↔ ker(α) is integrable (codim-1 foliation). Measured nonzero → NOT integrable. Consistent with Reeb's theorem: S³ admits no codim-1 foliation via this α.

details.encoding: At p=(1,0,0,0): α(e₁)=1, dα(e₂,e₃)=2 → α∧dα=2. z3 asked: can this value simultaneously equal 0? Result: UNSAT.
details.geometric_meaning: Contact form α is structurally non-integrable on S³. No 2-dimensional integral submanifolds of ker(α) can exist.

details.note: Reeb field R is in the kernel of ι_R(dα) restricted to T_pS³. This follows from p·v=0 for all tangent vectors.
Contact structure is non-degenerate at all 8 coordinate poles of S³
Hopf circle orbit of p=(1,0,0,0) stays on S³ for full revolution. α(R) = 1 preserved throughout.
Contact structure is non-degenerate at both p=(0.5,0.5,0.5,0.5) and its antipodal point -p. The standard contact form on S³ is invariant in nondegeneracy (|α∧dα|=2) under the antipodal involution.

summary.nondegeneracy_check: α∧dα ≠ 0 verified numerically on 50 random S³ points
summary.hopf_relation: R = generator of U(1) Hopf circle action e^{it}(z₀,z₁)
summary.scope: Standalone probe for S³ contact structure. Distinct from sim_geom_symplectic_kahler_contact.py which embeds contact as one item in a 3-structure comparative survey.
summary.interpretation: Standard contact structure on S³ verified via ℝ⁴ embedding. Contact 1-form α = x₀dx₁−x₁dx₀+x₂dx₃−x₃dx₂ satisfies: (1) α∧dα ≠ 0 everywhere — a nonzero volume form on each T_pS³. (2) Reeb field R=(−x₁,x₀,−x₃,x₂) satisfies α(R)=1 and (dα)(R,v)=0 for all tangent v, following from p·v=0. (3) R generates the U(1) Hopf circle action — its flow is e^{it}(z₀,z₁) where z_k are complex coordinates on ℂ². (4) Contact distribution ker(α) is maximally non-integrable (Frobenius: α∧dα≠0 violates integrability condition). (5) z3 UNSAT confirms: integrability assumption is algebraically contradictory. (6) Sympy verifies dα = 2(dx₀∧dx₁+dx₂∧dx₃) symbolically.
